items.prompt: Summarize what happens during the time Marvin is drawing the picture. Use key events from the text to support your summary.

This question has two parts. First, answer Part A. Then, answer Part B.

Part A

Which statement best summarizes the main idea of the text?

options.text: Even beetles are able to create works of art.
Strange events can happen while you are asleep.
You can do amazing things you didn't think you were able to do.
A small drawing can be as beautiful as a drawing that is much larger.

items.prompt:
Part B

Which sentence from the text best supports your answer in part A?

options.text: Marvin the beetle saw the bottle of ink.
At last he stopped, surveying his miniature scene.
Though he'd never done anything like this before, it seemed completelynatural, even unstoppable.
Then slowly, brows furrowed, James pulled out the chair and sat down.

items.prompt:
Read the sentence from the text.
Gently, delicately, and with immense concentration, Marvin lowered his front legs and began to draw.
A synonym is a word that means the same or nearly the same as another word. What is the synonym of immense?

Read the lines from the text.
It was finished.
It was perfect.
It was breathtaking.
Pick the statement that best explains why the author chose to include these lines.

options.text: The author wanted to split up the story by using shorter sentences.
The author wanted to strongly show Marvin's feelings about his drawing.
The author wanted to have this section look and feel more like a poem.
The author wanted to show that Marvin was done drawing and would not start again.
